prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约2428→2767→3165→3844，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1416名；2025年基准约3844名；本省理科/物理类计划2022年14人、2023年11人、2024年11人、2025年16人；2026年计划13人，较2025年缩招约18.75%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第82名（2026年），近年排名稳定在82–92区间；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++），2026年转为偏负面（宿舍火灾事件），可能小幅降低报考热度；抖音热度总排名第11（高热），曝光度较高；新闻传播学A+（全国顶尖），与该校文科招生专业直接对应，对文科考生吸引力强；理科专业涉及数字媒体技术、通信工程等，学科评估未单独评级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播学专业2023年因张雪峰言论出现明显劝退信号，2024年转为一般观望；电子信息/通信类专业2024年高热推荐，数字媒体技术等专业热度较高；本省2026年考生总数约66000人，较2025年（65897人）基本持平，物理类占比约67.5%估算约44550人，竞争环境稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近4年累计后移约1400名）、2026年计划缩招约18.75%使竞争加剧、声誉偏负面小幅降低报考热度、电子信息类专业热度较高部分对冲，在2025年基准3844名基础上预计位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约3462名，区间2962–3962名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 2428→2767→3165→3844, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1416 places over the past 4 years; 2025 baseline approximately 3844; provincial science/physics category enrollment plans: 14 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 16 in 2025; 2026 plan 13, a reduction of about 18.75% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 82nd (2026), stable in the 82–92 range in recent years; 2025 reputation slightly positive (Journalism and Communication A++), 2026 turns slightly negative (dormitory fire incident), may slightly reduce application enthusiasm; Douyin heat total ranking 11th (high heat), high exposure; Journalism and Communication A+ (national top), directly corresponding to the university's liberal arts admissions majors, strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; science majors involve Digital Media Technology, Communication Engineering, etc., with no separate discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication major saw a clear discouragement signal in 2023 due to Zhang Xuefeng's remarks, turning to general wait-and-see in 2024; Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Digital Media Technology and other majors have high popularity; provincial 2026 total candidates approximately 66,000, basically flat compared to 2025 (65,897), physics category estimated at about 67.5% or 44,550, stable competition environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (cumulative backward shift of about 1400 places over the past 4 years), the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 18.75% intensifying competition, slightly negative reputation slightly reducing application enthusiasm, and the high popularity of electronic information majors partially offsetting, based on the 2025 baseline of 3844, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward; predicted minimum ranking approximately 3462, range 2962–3962.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 372 → 2510 → 724 → 622, with significant fluctuations; 2023 was abnormally high (2510), 2024 dropped to 724, and 2025 rebounded to 622; the baseline for 2025 is about 622nd place; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 12, an increase of about 71.4% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 82nd (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 82–92 range; reputation in 2025 was somewhat positive (Journalism and Communication A++), turning somewhat negative in 2026 (dormitory fire incident), which may slightly reduce application enthusiasm; Douyin heat ranking 11th overall (high heat), with high exposure; Journalism and Communication A+ (top nationally), directly corresponding to the university's liberal arts admissions majors (Journalism, Communication, Advertising, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.), strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Journalism and Communication major saw a clear discouragement signal in 2023 due to Zhang Xuefeng's remarks, turning to general wait-and-see in 2024, with application enthusiasm recovering but still cautious; the Chinese Language and Literature major was recommended in 2023 and 2024, with stable popularity; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 66,000, with the history category accounting for approximately 32.5%, estimated at about 21,450, basically unchanged from 2025 (21,406).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 plan by about 71.4%, which greatly eases competition, the strong appeal of the A+ Journalism and Communication discipline, and the partially offsetting cautious major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 622nd place, the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 859th, with a range of 704–1014.
